texto: Since scarcity is the basic economic problem, if it does not exist then there is no reason for my economics course. Devoting time to the study of how people use limited resources to fulfill unlimited wants and needs should help us to discover how to best utilize the resources we have at our disposal.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kurt Bills sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Since scarcity is the basic economic problem, if it does not exist then there is no reason for my…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, time, help, útil em momentos de estudos e help.
